revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing programmatically generated pages
1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
Adding [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:TOC bottom/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]
#redirect[[en:Template:TOC bottom/doc]] [[Category:qq]][[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:qq]][[sn::refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]
#redirect[[en:Template:TOC bottom/doc]] [[Category:11]][[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:11]][[sn::refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]
#redirect[[:en:Template:TOC bottom/doc]] [[Category:11]][[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:11]][[sn::refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]
#redirect[[:en:Template:TOC bottom/doc]] [[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[sn::refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23626449376|time triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24975162458|time triggered pipeline]]
